subject: Fee Reminder — July 2026
body_html:
Dear Parent,

This is a reminder that the fee for July 2026 is due by 15th July 2026. Kindly ensure timely payment to avoid late charges.

Amount Due: ₹12,500

Regards,
Sri Gowthami Institutions

subject: Annual Sports Day — 20th June 2026
body_html:
Dear Parents and Students,

We are pleased to announce the Annual Sports Day on 20th June 2026 at the school grounds.

Students are requested to wear their sports uniform. Parents are cordially invited.

Event timings: 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM

subject: Attendance Alert — Low Attendance Warning
body_html:
Dear Parent,

This is to inform you that your child's attendance has fallen below 85%. Current attendance: 78%.

Please ensure regular attendance. Further absence may require a written explanation.

subject: Unit Test — Schedule for June 2026
body_html:
Dear Parents and Students,

The Unit Test for June 2026 is scheduled as follows:

  • Mathematics — 15 June
  • Science — 16 June
  • English — 17 June
  • Social Studies — 18 June

Students must carry their ID cards.

subject: School Circular — Summer Uniform
body_html:
Dear Parents,

With effect from 15 June 2026, students are permitted to wear the summer uniform. Winter uniforms are optional until 30 June.

Please ensure uniforms are clean and properly ironed.

subject: Attendance Alert — Arjun Sharma (67%)
body_html: Dear Parent, your child Arjun Sharma's attendance is 67%, below the 75% threshold.
